---
title: "Teaching"
---

<div class="teaching-group">

## Teaching at Harris School, University of Chicago

- Principles of Microeconomics and Public Policy II, Winter 2025, Winter 2026, Winter 2027

</div>

<div class="teaching-group">

## Teaching Assistant at Cornell

- Industrial Organization and Regulation II (graduate), Spring 2021
- CICER Winter Research Program, Winter 2020
- Intermediate Microeconomics (undergraduate), Fall 2020, Spring 2021, Fall 2021
- Introductory Macroeconomics (undergraduate), Spring 2019
- Introductory Microeconomics (undergraduate), Fall 2018

</div>

<div class="teaching-group">

## Teaching Assistant at Seoul National University

- Studies in Microeconomics (graduate), Spring 2016

</div>

<div class="teaching-group">

## Teaching Award

- The Louis Walinsky Fund in Economics Outstanding Teaching Award, 2021

</div>
